query:
SELECT u.name, up.assignedBusinessLines
FROM users u
INNER JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name IN ('Paul Lueth', 'Ryan Pemberton', 'Daniel Zec', 'Leo Williams ', 'Lee', 'Brett Hansen', 'Tim Oneil-Shaw ', 'Egor Ivanov', 'Kevin Arnandes')
ORDER BY u.name;
command:

ORDER BY u.name;
